name: Seasoned Spinach Balls
recipeIngredient: 18 ounces frozen chopped spinach -- thawed and well-drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Squeeze as much moisture as possible from the spinach using paper towels.
3. In a large bowl, combine all ingredients and mix well.
4. Shape into 1-inch balls.
5. Place on two ungreased 15-by-10-by-1-inch baking sheets.
6. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 to 12 minutes or until set.
- Makes 8 dozen appetizers.
- Per appetizer: 24 calories; 2 g fat (1.2 g saturated fat); 75 percent of calories from fat; 14 mg cholesterol; 48 mg sodium; 0.8 g carbohydrates.
